issues.detail: The instructions lack explicit error handling and edge case coverage.

scenarios.name: Add a custom task-card shape to a tldraw kanban board
scenarios.rationale: Treatment extends BaseBoxShapeUtil with static type, getDefaultProps, an HTMLContainer-based component(), and an indicator() for zoomed-out rendering; baseline writes a generic React component and skips tldraw's shape utility contract.

scenarios.name: Persist canvas state to a backend with debounced auto-save
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses editor.store.getSnapshot() and editor.store.loadSnapshot(), sets up editor.store.listen with debounce ~2s, and PUTs the snapshot to a documents endpoint; baseline relies on persistenceKey/localStorage and misses the snapshot APIs.
